planning_receipt.statement: PLAN-EA-XPLAT-002 v2.2 is complete at 20/20. The first public Unsigned Preview is verified end to end across macOS arm64/x64, Windows x64 and Ubuntu x64. Formal signed Stable planning was cancelled by scope decision and its five tasks were removed rather than reported as done or blocked.

scope_revision.policy: Unsigned Preview is the only public release milestone in this plan. Restoring signed or notarized releases requires a new Plan ID.

unsigned_preview.title: 公开未签名预览版（唯一发布通道）

BASE-001.title: 固定当前 Hooks/UI/桌宠基线
BASE-001.receipt: Fresh make check on 2026-07-11: Core 900, Desktop 294, all typecheck/lint/build gates passed.
BASE-001.notes: Baseline is isolated on codex/cross-platform-release-v2; no runtime-private files are tracked.

GOV-002.title: 建立全仓格式化与零告警门禁
GOV-002.receipt: Fresh make check passed format, test typecheck and zero-warning lint gates.
GOV-002.notes: Configuration and mechanical formatting remain separate commits.

PORT-003.title: 用 Node 原生实现 Glob/Grep
PORT-003.receipt: Core search coverage is included in the fresh 900-test make check run.
PORT-003.notes: Node-native Glob/Grep retains workspace and symlink boundary tests.

IPC-004.title: 建立全量类型化 Core operation registry
IPC-004.receipt: Core/Desktop operation, IPC, preload and renderer tests/typechecks passed in make check.
IPC-004.notes: Typed operation registry remains the shared contract source.

RSC-005.title: 直接读取只读 runtime defaults 并校验 manifest
RSC-005.receipt: Runtime manifest/resource tests passed in make check and package:verify.
RSC-005.notes: Signed runtime resources remain read-only; legacy migration is non-destructive.

SKILL-006.title: 最小内置 Skill 与 Core 原生 Creator
SKILL-006.receipt: Skill manager/creator tests passed and package:verify contains only skill-creator.
SKILL-006.notes: skills-catalog remains inactive and excluded from packaged runtime.

ENV-FND-007.title: 建立 Environment schemas、catalog 与 store
ENV-FND-007.receipt: Environment schema/catalog/store tests passed in the fresh Core 900-test run.
ENV-FND-007.notes: Catalog remains immutable, validated and revision-bound.

ENV-PROBE-008.title: 实现无 shell 探测和项目识别
ENV-PROBE-008.receipt: Probe, PATH, project detector and version tests passed in make check.
ENV-PROBE-008.notes: All probe execution remains shell:false with bounded output and time.

ENV-SNAP-009.title: 统一执行环境 snapshot
ENV-SNAP-009.receipt: Snapshot and integration tests passed in the fresh Core test run.
ENV-SNAP-009.notes: Turn snapshots remain immutable and stdio MCP refreshes on the next call.

ENV-JOB-010.title: 安装计划、job 和中断恢复
ENV-JOB-010.receipt: Job, lock, cancellation, recovery and process-tree tests passed in make check.
ENV-JOB-010.notes: Interrupted jobs re-probe and never auto-resume.

ENV-MAC-011.title: macOS 安装 adapter
ENV-MAC-011.receipt: macOS adapter/download/process tests passed in the fresh Core test run.
ENV-MAC-011.notes: No real system installer was executed during local verification.

ENV-WIN-012.title: Windows 安装 adapter
ENV-WIN-012.receipt: Windows adapter, Authenticode and ZIP tests passed in make check.
ENV-WIN-012.notes: No real installer or UAC prompt was executed during local verification.

ENV-LNX-013.title: Ubuntu 安装 adapter
ENV-LNX-013.receipt: Ubuntu adapter, TAR, download and process tests passed in make check.
ENV-LNX-013.notes: No package manager or elevation prompt was executed locally.

SKILL-INSTALL-014.title: 安全预览并安装外部 Skill
SKILL-INSTALL-014.receipt: Skill source, archive, preview/confirm and blocked-state tests passed in make check.
SKILL-INSTALL-014.notes: Network installs remain staged, digest-bound and permission-gated.

ENV-API-015.title: 接入 CoreApi、IPC、事件和 diagnostics
ENV-API-015.receipt: CoreApi, IPC, diagnostics and event tests/typechecks passed in make check.
ENV-API-015.notes: Renderer cannot submit installer commands, URLs or argv.

ENV-UI-016.title: 诊断环境与 Skill 状态 UI
ENV-UI-016.receipt: Desktop environment model tests passed in make check; prior Playwright acceptance covered desktop/mobile flows.
ENV-UI-016.notes: Diagnostics UI exposes plan confirmation, progress, cancellation and recovery.

PKG-017.title: 最小资源打包与 packaged smoke
PKG-017.receipt: Fresh npm --prefix desktop run package:verify passed on macOS arm64 with minimal-PATH packaged smoke.
PKG-017.notes: Unsigned local package is accepted only as a packaged-runtime test artifact.

PREVIEW-WF-023.title: 建立未签名 Preview 构建通道
PREVIEW-WF-023.receipt: Preview contract tests 7/7 and release bundle tests 4/4 passed; full make check passed Core 903 and Desktop 318 tests, typechecks, zero-warning lint, format and production build. A real macOS arm64 preview-config directory package skipped signing because identity is explicitly null and passed minimal-PATH packaged smoke.
PREVIEW-WF-023.notes: release-preview.yml is tag-only and contents-read; it builds macOS arm64/x64, Windows x64 and Linux x64 candidates without signing secrets, labels artifacts/markers/receipts UNSIGNED-PREVIEW, runs Ubuntu 22.04/24.04 lifecycle smoke, and cannot publish. Legacy release tags exclude all prereleases and the legacy assembler explicitly rejects Preview input.

PREVIEW-PUB-024.title: 聚合并原子发布 GitHub Pre-release
PREVIEW-PUB-024.receipt: Preview release and bundle suites passed 21/21 focused tests; full make check passed Core 903 and Desktop 332 tests, all typechecks, zero-warning lint, format, Shell syntax and production build.
PREVIEW-PUB-024.notes: The fail-closed assembler accepts exactly seven UNSIGNED-PREVIEW products plus same-run candidate/smoke/lifecycle receipts, validates SHA-256 and emits deterministic unsigned manifest/notice. Aggregate generates CycloneDX 1.6 and two GitHub attestations; only the final job has contents:write. Publication preflight preserves signingStatus:unsigned and bilingual risk disclosure, requires default-branch reachability, refuses existing Releases, creates a prerelease draft, verifies exact remote asset inventory and deletes its draft on failure. Attestations are documented as provenance/integrity only, not publisher trust.

PREVIEW-QA-025.title: 发布并验收首个未签名预览版
PREVIEW-QA-025.receipt: GitHub Actions run 29227858676 completed every macOS arm64/x64, Windows x64, Linux x64, Ubuntu 22.04/24.04 lifecycle, aggregate/attest and atomic publish job. Public prerelease v0.1.0-preview.1 contains exactly 13 assets and seven installable products; all 12 SHA256SUMS entries passed and every product passed both repository-bound provenance and CycloneDX SBOM attestation verification.
PREVIEW-QA-025.notes: Published at https://github.com/TheSyart/emperor-agent/releases/tag/v0.1.0-preview.1 from annotated tag v0.1.0-preview.1 at 87717979903ada861b5ef6e7e0111e7b6e894eb7. Manifest and marker preserve signingStatus=unsigned, notarized=false and UNSIGNED-PREVIEW risk disclosure. Four prior fail-closed runs exposed and fixed Windows CRLF checkout, Linux architecture naming, DEB dependency installation and CycloneDX serial-number defects. No other release workflow was triggered.
